shadowSentences: The weather is really nice today.
I enjoy reading books in my free time.
My favorite season is spring because of the flowers.
I like to cook dinner for my friends on weekends.
Traveling to new places helps me learn about cultures.
Listening to music helps me relax after a long day.
I often go hiking in the mountains during the summer.
Learning a new language can be challenging but rewarding.
Volunteering at local shelters makes me feel fulfilled.
Watching documentaries opens my mind to different perspectives.

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about environmental behaviors.
questions: Q1: Can you share an experience when you practiced an eco-friendly habit?
Q2: What challenges do you face in maintaining these behaviors?
Q3: What do you think about the importance of environmental protection?
Q4: What advice would you give someone trying to live more sustainably?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about hobbies.
questions: Q1: What hobby do you enjoy the most and why?
Q2: Have you encountered any difficulties while pursuing this hobby?
Q3: How do you think hobbies impact our daily lives?
Q4: What suggestions would you give to someone looking for a new hobby?

interviewScenarios.intro: You have agreed to take part in a research study about digital learning.
questions: Q1: Can you describe your experience with online learning?
Q2: What obstacles have you faced while studying digitally?
Q3: How effective do you think digital learning is compared to traditional methods?
Q4: What tips would you offer to improve the online learning experience?
